title: Migrate SHA2C into the unified entry
description: Port the missing SHA2C algorithm surface from DiffAero, wire it into the unified registry/CLI, and add acceptance tests.
acceptance: At least one isaaclab-newton smoke command through train.py --algo sha2c passes
Targeted test coverage exists for registry/CLI/training construction behavior
review_focus: No regression to existing apg/ppo/shac/mashac/world registry behavior
Stable tuple and state semantics for training loop outputs
